x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist natural language processing performs best on English text. High non-ASCII rates indicate multilingual incident data that may require additional language pack configuration.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Conduct a manual language spot-check of incident short_description and close_notes fields. If significant non-English volume is confirmed, engage ServiceNow account team to discuss multilingual Now Assist language pack configuration.
